excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that visible query-token cue decoding is a learned decoder-only transformer result
a claim that this deterministic cue-copy diagnostic is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A standard-input cue-copy diagnostic over the Stage 52-55 row family.
Evidence about how much of the Stage 55 metadata upper bound survives when cues are decoded only from visible tokens.
Fair reporting across the same RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap method set, with failed-run retention.

decision.claim_boundary: Visible-token cue-copy features solve at least one retrieval lane but not the full retrieval set.

visible_cues: query token reference_delta modulo 16 for retrieval rows

excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that explicit row metadata is a standard decoder-only input feature
a claim that this upper bound is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A transparent row-metadata cue-copy upper-bound audit over the Stage 52-54 row family.
Evidence about whether the retrieval rows are solvable when the target-distance/congruence cue is explicitly exposed.
Fair reporting across the same RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap method set, with failed-run retention.
